# Field Notes

Personal research vault. Markdown files organized by quarter. Goal: keep
the inbox at zero by promoting ideas into structured notes or deleting
them.

## Conventions

- New ideas land in `inbox/`. Triaged weekly.
- Promoted notes go into `YYYY-QN/` folders, named after the topic.
- Meeting notes always include date + attendees in the first line.
- Reference links go at the bottom under a `## Sources` heading.

## Allowed tools

This project's relay scope is restricted to filesystem-only (no shell, no
network MCPs). Anything that needs the web should be done via the
researcher's browser, not the agent.
